response.original_title: ((Extra~Room~Addition)) How do I add another room on Silversea Cruise? Step-by-Step Room Addition Guide Explained
response.overview: To add an additional cabin to an existing Silversea Cruises booking, you must contact Silversea directly at +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK) or work through your travel agent.Online systems generally +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280 do not support adding rooms to existing bookings, so calling is necessary to check availability, link the reservations for dining, +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280 and manage pricing.  Contact Silversea Support: Call +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280 (USA), +44-[204]-586-5316(UK), or your travel agent. To add another room +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK) to an existing Silversea cruise booking, you must create a new, separate booking for the additional cabin and then have them linked, +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK) as Silversea does not support multiple cabin bookings in a single transaction. To add a room (additional cabin) to an existing Silversea Cruises booking, you must call Silversea directly at +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280 (USA) or contact your travel agent.
response.title: ((Extra~Room~Addition)) How do I add another room on Silversea Cruise? Step-by-Step Room Addition Guide Explained
